articles.title: MARKETING TEAM
articles.summary: Fortune 50 companies like AWS and Google and fast growing startups like Vercel and Secureframe work with TLDR to reach our audience of over 4 million tech-savvy decision makers with highly customized campaigns (like this one!). If you know a marketer who could benefit from running a campaign with us, I'd appreciate it if you sent them our advertising page [4]! Thanks!

articles.title: JAPAN’S PREMIER AI LAB LAUNCHES ITS FIRST MODEL
articles.summary: Sakana AI creates state-of-the-art Japanese language, vision, and image generation models. It introduced an evolutionary model merge that aims to evolve foundation models without expensive pretraining. The model merge has been released along with an explanation of the method.

articles.title: COHERE’S COMMAND-R ENTERPRISE MODEL COMING TO AI.NVIDIA.COM
articles.summary: Cohere’s newly launched RAG-optimized Command-R model, designed for businesses to get into large-scale production, is coming to the recently launched NVIDIA API catalog.

articles.title: BIDEN-HARRIS ADMINISTRATION ANNOUNCES DEAL WITH INTEL FOR AI CHIPS
articles.summary: The U.S. Department of Commerce has proposed granting Intel up to $8.5 billion under the CHIPS and Science Act to support semiconductor projects in multiple states. This funding aims to bolster U.S. chip manufacturing, develop critical technologies like AI, and create thousands of jobs. Intel's planned $100 billion investment in expansion is one of the largest in U.S. semiconductor history.

articles.title: SCENE SCRIPT 3D SCENE RECONSTRUCTION
articles.summary: Meta Reality Labs has trained a model that takes visual input and translates it into a 3D representation of a scene. The 70m parameter model runs quickly on-device and exhibits extreme stability.

articles.title: IMAGE GENERATION WITH DIFFUSION STATE SPACE MODELS
articles.summary: Diffusion State Space Models (DiS) are a new type of diffusion model that use a state space backbone instead of the traditional U-Net for image data. These models can handle long-range dependencies and are efficient in generating high-quality images with less computational effort.

articles.title: LLM’S ABSTRACT THINKING DATASET
articles.summary: PuzzleVQA is a dataset designed to test the abstract reasoning capabilities of large multimodal models like GPT-4V.

articles.title: CODY — THE AI CODING ASSISTANT THAT UNDERSTANDS YOUR CODE BASE
articles.summary: Every day, Sourcegraph’s Cody [11] helps developers write >150,000 lines of code. Here’s how: AUTOCOMPLETE: Cody autocompletes single lines or whole functions in any programming language [11], configuration file, or documentation.

articles.title: ➡️ Use Cody for free in your IDE
TORCHTUNE
articles.summary: Meta has released a native PyTorch library for fine-tuning language models.

articles.title: MEDICAL ANOMALY DETECTION WITH ADAPTED CLIP MODELS
3D RECONSTRUCTION WITH FEDERATED LEARNING
articles.summary: Fed3DGS introduces a federated learning framework for scalable 3D reconstruction, utilizing 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) to enable decentralized scene building across vast areas.

articles.title: IMPRESSION WITH GPT 4 EARLY ACCESS FINE TUNING
articles.summary: The GPT-4 fine-tuning API allows you to create a custom version of GPT-4 that can be 3x better at 1.5x the cost.

articles.title: AI AND THE FUTURE OF WORK
articles.summary: Anthropic's latest AI, Claude, achieves high scores on Mensa tests, signaling proximity to self-improving AI and posing both opportunities and existential risks. Machine learning is already displacing jobs, as evident at Klarna, where a customer service AI replaced 700 agents, hinting at an accelerating trend in automation. Duolingo's recent layoffs due to AI's translation capabilities further underscore this shift, emphasizing the growing impact of AI on the future of work.

articles.title: TWO YEARS LATER, DEEP LEARNING IS STILL FACED WITH THE SAME FUNDAMENTAL CHALLENGES
articles.summary: Two years after publishing a skeptical AI article, Gary Marcus revisits his predictions and stands by his initial skepticism. Despite advancements like GPT-4, fundamental issues like genuine comprehension and trustworthy AI remain unresolved. Marcus concludes that scaling up data and computing power alone won't achieve AGI, and interdisciplinary collaboration is crucial.

articles.title: APPLE’S AI AMBITIONS COULD INCLUDE GOOGLE OR OPENAI
articles.summary: Apple is in talks with Google to integrate Gemini generative AI technology into the iPhone and is considering using OpenAI's ChatGPT.

articles.title: COPY.AI'S JOURNEY TO 10 MILLION USERS IN FOUR YEARS
articles.summary: Copy.ai, an AI-powered writing tool, managed to acquire an impressive 10 million users within just four years.

articles.title: WORLD’S FIRST MAJOR ACT TO REGULATE AI PASSED BY EUROPEAN LAWMAKERS
articles.summary: The European Parliament has approved the first major AI regulation framework, setting global standards for artificial intelligence governance.
